text: I have no voice, yet I answer in the dark; call into the cavern and I call back. What am I?
I swell while you wait and fade the moment you feed. What am I?
Eight legs weave my silent trap; the careless become my supper. What am I?
Name me and you destroy me; meditation only deepens me. What am I?
The first to fall taught the last to rise. Name the cycle written in the First Tome.
clue: Read the oldest book to know the word.

text: I am always coming but never arrive; the deeper you descend, the closer I get. What am I?
I have many teeth but never bite, and I open the way only for those who know my shape. What am I?
Cut me and I multiply; ignore me and I fade. I am the dark ruler's harvest. What am I?
clue: Killing your own kin feeds me.

text: I am born in the chest in the dark and make cowards of the brave; LUCK is my enemy. What am I?
clue: It feeds the dark ruler's axis.

text: The more of me you spill, the weaker you grow, yet I am the price of every blow you take. What am I?
